sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106187" key="u(bristodi/kai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑβρ-ιστοδίκαι</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n106187.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">abusers of law,</tr_> i.e. corrupt jurymen, name of a Comedy by Eupolis.</sense> </entryFree>
